notes: Admits 6 people at $9/adult and $6/child. Returnable physical pass. Limited to one booking per month per person.
raw: Coupon admits 6 people at $9 per adult and $6 per child. Note: This pass is limited to one booking per month per person. Physical (must be picked up at the library and returned) passes are available. Select your location preference and then pick the dates from the availability calendar.
